history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young boy, likely a student, stands outdoors at night. He is wearing a school uniform consisting of a patterned blue short-sleeved shirt, dark navy pants, and a dark blue baseball cap with a school emblem. He has a lanyard with a red and blue card holder around his neck and a black backpack on his shoulders. The boy is smiling and looking slightly to his right, with his hands in his pockets.

The background is dimly lit and appears to be an outdoor area with a brick wall on the left and a corrugated metal roof structure overhead. There's a bright light source illuminating the scene from above and to the right, casting shadows. To the right of the boy, there are potted plants, one with large green leaves and another smaller one with dry soil. A large, rough-textured rock is in the foreground. The overall mood is casual and perhaps a bit tired, suggested by the late hour and the text overlay at the bottom which reads "Mpls day 3 Tetap semangat dee 💪💪" (MPLS day 3 Keep up the spirit dee 💪💪), indicating it's the third day of a school orientation period. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, grays, and muted earthy tones, with the bright light creating some contrast. The style is realistic, like a candid snapshot taken with a smartphone.
